recommendations.title: Tekken
recommendations.genres: Crime, Drama, Action, Thriller, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: In the year of 2039, after World Wars destroy much of the civilization as we know it, territories are no longer run by governments, but by corporations; the mightiest of which is the Mishima Zaibatsu. In order to placate the seething masses of this d

recommendations.title: Trigun: Badlands Rumble
recommendations.overview: In a quicksand surrounded town called Makka, rumors spread of a legendary robber named Gasback is after the town. To protect it, Mayor Kepler has hired bounty hunters. These hunters have been following Gasback from town to town in hopes of getting th

recommendations.title: For a Few Dollars More
recommendations.overview: Two bounty hunters both pursue the brutal and sadistic bandit, El Indio, who has a large bounty on his head.

recommendations.title: Kites
recommendations.overview: A wounded man searches for his sweetheart in the Mexican desert while on the run from the police, bounty hunters, and others.

recommendations.title: The Colony
recommendations.overview: Forced underground by the next ice age, a struggling outpost of survivors must fight to preserve humanity against a threat even more savage than nature.

recommendations.title: The Hunter
recommendations.overview: During his long career, bounty hunter Ralph "Papa" Thorson has caught over 5,000 criminals. Now, while he is working on apprehending fugitives in Illinois, Texas and Nebraska, he himself is being hunted by a psychotic killer.

recommendations.title: Spacehunter: Adventures in the Forbidden Zone
recommendations.overview: On a distant planet inhabited by mutants, two bounty hunters race to rescue three Earth female captives from the clutches of an evil warlord.

recommendations.title: Still Life
recommendations.overview: A council case worker looks for the relatives of those found dead and alone.

recommendations.title: The Great Silence
recommendations.overview: A mute gunslinger fights in the defense of a group of outlaws and a vengeful young widow, against a group of ruthless bounty hunters.

recommendations.title: Trancers
